rent.note: furnished 1BR in Centro Storico or Pratello; ~€834/mo avg; €800–1,200 range

utilities.note: electric + water + internet; ~€180/mo; heating costs in winter

groceries.note: home cooking; excellent local markets and delis

diningOut.note: trattorias and osterie; Bologna food scene is world-class

transit.note: monthly bus pass ~€35; compact and walkable city

coworking.note: hot-desk monthly; university city with growing options

misc.note: gym, toiletries, entertainment, food culture buffer

accomSeasonality._doc: 12 monthly multipliers for RENT ONLY (Jan..Dec). 1.0 = base.

evidence.quote: A comfortable lifestyle costs €1,800–€2,500/month, with 1-bedroom rent from €800–€1,200
The average monthly rent for a 1-bedroom apartment in the city centre is £834
Basic utilities in Bologna (including electricity, heating, cooling, water, and garbage for an 85m² apartment) cost an average of £180 per month
You can expect to spend around £1,685 per month for 1 person as of 2026
